summary: Comprehensive testing of Dynamic Public Venue Pages feature. All features tested successfully - public venue page at /venue/:slug loads without login, shows venue details, reviews, amenities, location. QR Code and Share buttons work. 404 error shows for non-existent slugs. Owner dashboard shows public page URL with View Public Page, QR Code, and Copy Link buttons.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/venues/slug/powerplay-arena returns 200 with complete venue data - PASS
GET /api/venues/slug/smashpoint-courts returns 200 with correct venue - PASS
Venue by slug returns all required fields (id, name, slug, description, sports, amenities, etc.) - PASS
Venues list endpoint includes slug field for all venues - PASS
Owner venues endpoint includes slug field for public page URL - PASS
Venue reviews endpoint works for public page display - PASS
frontend_public_page_tests: Public venue page /venue/powerplay-arena loads without login - PASS
Amenities section with icons (Parking, Changing Rooms, Floodlights, Water Cooler) - PASS
Location section with address and Google Maps link - PASS
frontend_qr_code_tests: QR Code button opens dialog - PASS
QR Code dialog shows scannable QR code - PASS
QR Code dialog shows venue name and city - PASS
Copy Link button in QR dialog - PASS
Done button closes QR dialog - PASS
frontend_404_tests: Go Home button visible on 404 page - PASS
owner_dashboard_tests: Owner dashboard shows public URL /venue/powerplay-arena - PASS
View Public Page button visible - PASS
QR Code button visible in owner dashboard - PASS
Copy Link button visible in owner dashboard - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: PublicVenuePage.js properly implements slug-based routing at /venue/:slug
VenueOwnerDashboard.js correctly shows public page URL and action buttons (lines 385-425)
App.js route at line 70 correctly configured without ProtectedRoute for public access
venues.py backend correctly implements GET /api/venues/slug/{venue_slug} endpoint
generate_slug and unique_slug functions properly create URL-friendly slugs
qrcode.react library (v4.2.0) properly renders QR codes
Page auto-polls every 30s for real-time updates
SEO title tag updates dynamically for each venue
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data with slugs (powerplay-arena, smashpoint-courts, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic Public Venue Pages feature fully tested. Public URL format is /venue/:slug (e.g., /venue/powerplay-arena). Backend API is GET /api/venues/slug/{slug}. Available slugs include: powerplay-arena, smashpoint-courts, the-cricket-hub, goal-zone, kick-off-bengaluru, marina-turf-club. Owner dashboard shows public URL with globe icon and action buttons (View Public Page, QR Code, Copy Link) in the venue selector area. QR codes use qrcode.react v4.2.0. Clipboard copy may show permission error in automated testing but works in real browser.

mocked_apis.payment: MOCKED - Razorpay payment via mock-confirm endpoint
